title: Pyrex Bake & Enjoy Glass Loaf Dish High Resistance 28 Cm
features: Borosilicate Glass: to monitor the uniform cooking of your dough
Oven safe up to 300°C - Microwave and diswasher safe
description: From the manufacturer Discover our Pyrex glass bakeware range Bake & Enjoy is made for making your classics of patisserie each time a success! Your baking partner since 1915 Pyrex has been the choice of bakers for centuries. It's the reliable brand for making your classics each time a success. Baking has always been about love & transmission. Apple pie, chocolate cake, pound cake… Over the years classic family recipes are passed down from generation to generation To make classic pastries, Pyrex invented Bake & Enjoy: a large range of dishes made from ultra-resistant and healthy glass. Watch your creation baking, slice and serve directly from the dish or serve directly to the table. Result: pastry is healthy and easy! Glass: an ideal material for baking Healthy material No odour transfer/No colour transfer 1 dish = many recipes Cut directly in the mould without scratch risks Bake, store & re-heat! Thanks to our extremely resistant borosilicate glass you can put your dish directly from the freezer to the oven! Glass transparency to check the cooking A bit of history... The pie plate was Pyrex's first product and the one that gave its name to the brand. Corning had initially thought of "Py-right", but finally opted for Pyrex, to work with Nonex, the first borosilicate glass formula patented by the company. This item very quickly became the ambassador of Pyrex cooking glass, the symbol of its cleanliness and clarity. Cinnamon and cardamom flan Crush the cardamom pods gently and remove the dark seeds. Crush the seeds to a fine powder and use. Add all the ingredients together and mix well, making sure the egg is beaten up. Pour into a Pyrex flan dish and bake at 150C for 40mins. The flan is done with the centre reaches 74C. Chill the flan thoroughly. Just before serving sprinkle an even layer of demerara sugar over the flan (approx 40-50g) Using a strong blowtorch, caramelise the sugar to give a crispy crackling surface without cooking the flan. Sprinkle over chopped pistachios to finish. Ingredients 5 eggs 120g milk 430g double cream 400ml condensed milk 3 cardamom pods ½ tsp cinnamon
